name: Order's Resilience
description: Increase your Strength, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20. When you have the Prone condition, you can right yourself with only 5 feet of movement. If you are within 5 feet of an ally that doesn't have the Incapacitated condition, you and that ally have advantage on Strength saving throws, provided you are not incapacitated.
